Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 65 iii) Shunt trip coil of each type 20 nos. iv) Closing coil of each type 20 nos. v) Current transformer of each type and ratio of each type 5 nos. vi) Potential transformer of each type and ratio of each type 2 nos. vii) Protective relay of each type 2 nos. viii) Anti-pumping relay of each type and rating 5 nos. ix) Auxiliary relays of each type 5 nos. x) Lock out relays of each type 5 nos. xi) Timers of each type 5 nos. xii) Moving contact assembly of each installed rating 10 sets xiii) Stationary (fixed) contact 10 sets xiv) Bus seal-off bushings of each type 5 nos. xv) Busbar support insulators 5% of total population xvi) Limit switches of each type 5 nos. xvii) Closing spring of each type 5 nos. xviii) Tripping spring of each type 5 nos. xix) Control switches of each type 5 nos. xx) Selector switches of each type 5 nos. xxi) Isolation switch for the control supply of each type 5 nos. xxii) Operating mechanism rod for each rating 5 nos. xxiii) Set of gaskets of each rating 5 sets xxiv) Ammeter of each type and range 5 nos. xxv) Voltmeter of each type and range 5 nos. xxvi) Circuit breaker aux. contact assembly of each type and rating 5 nos. xxvii) Indicating lamps 50 nos. xxviii) Indicating lamp covers of all colours, lamp resistors and holders 10% of installed quantity xxix) Fuse base and holder of each type and rating of each type 5 nos. xxx) Fuse of each rating of each type of each type 10 nos. xxxi) Maintenance tools and accessories for maintenance 3 sets xxxii) Carbon brushes for spring charging motor 20 sets xxxiii) Isolating contact (Fixed a nd moving) of each rating 1 set xxxiv) Terminal blocks 10 nos. xxxv) Arc chute (for each rating) 5 nos. xxxvi) Bearings for spring charging motor 5 sets xxxvii) Multiple pin plug contact assy. with cables (male and female) 5 nos. xxxviii) Guide for moving
